summary: Implemented US-006: Added deterministic fast, mixed, and poor connection presets. Created PresetName type and PRESET_SNAPSHOTS with tuned values (fast: RTT=20/jitter=5, mixed: RTT=350/jitter=150, poor: RTT=950/jitter=450) that produce clearly differentiated SceneParams through mapSnapshotToScene. Built a PresetState manager with select/current/subscribe API, and a preset selector UI with three buttons rendered in the overlay. Wired everything into main.ts. All quality gates pass: lint, typecheck, 125 unit tests, 17 E2E tests.
